chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 388 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on main case. 2. For hearing on CMA No. 3294/18. 01.12.2025 Mr. Salman Yousuf, advocate holding brief for Ms. Navin Merchant, advocate for appellants. Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for Respondent SSGC along with Mr. Raja Lov Kush, Deputy Manager (Legal) SSGC. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. This matter is pending since 2018 without any progress. Today, brief is being held and time is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. This appeal is clogging the docket for more than seven years. It appears that the appellants are not interested in proceeding with this appeal, therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
